reason: All 6 steps executed successfully with agent responding correctly to math question
steps: Step 1 - Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing agent list in sidebar and home screen with agent cards
Step 2 - Found and clicked "QA-20260413-212321-agy5" agent in sidebar — Agent detail page opened, showing landing page with message input field
Step 3 - Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status shows "idle" (blue dot indicator at top of page)
Step 4 - Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message typed into input field and submitted via Send button; message appeared in chat as user message
Step 5 - Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Response received in approximately 1 second; activity indicator completed
Step 6 - Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Agent response clearly displays "4" as the answer to the math question; screenshot confirms response with timestamp "Worked for 1s"
